steps.name: Mode switching primitives and set-mode bridge
criteria: set-mode primitive changes the current editor mode
Mode change triggers active keymap switch
current-mode reflects the new mode after switch
Invalid mode name returns error message
Mode stored as string in EditorState

steps.name: Vim normal mode keybindings plugin
criteria: Plugin creates normal-mode and insert-mode keymaps
Normal mode: h j k l for navigation
Normal mode: i enters insert mode
Normal mode: x deletes char under cursor
Normal mode: dd deletes current line

steps.name: Vim insert mode and Escape to normal
criteria: Insert mode: typing inserts characters
Insert mode: Escape returns to normal mode
Mode transition updates the active keymap
Status bar reflects current mode change
Backspace works in insert mode

steps.name: Integration test proving full modal editing
criteria: Start in normal mode with hjkl navigation
Press i to enter insert mode and type text
Press Escape to return to normal mode
dd deletes current line in normal mode
All behavior driven by Lisp plugin not Rust code
